scripts.build: echo 'Building pkg-verbose-42 with verbose output...' && for n in $(seq 1 210); do echo "  [pkg-verbose-42] Processing file $n/210..."; done && echo 'pkg-verbose-42 complete!' && mkdir -p dist && date > dist/.stamp
scripts.test: echo 'Running pkg-verbose-42 test suite...' && for n in $(seq 1 20); do echo "  test $n: PASS"; done && echo 'All tests passed.'
